reference: Hello, on Sunday I was eating soup with fish and I accidentally swallowed a fish scale. It pricked my throat on the way down, but I thought it had passed. After some time, I had a feeling like it was stuck in my throat; every time I swallow, I can feel it. Today, it moved lower down my throat. I think since it is so small and flat, it is just stuck in my throat. What should I do? Is it dangerous? I am very worried; please help.
text: Hello. On Sunday, I was eating soup with fish, and I accidentally swallowed a fish scale. It took my throat on the way down, but I thought it had passed. After some time, I had a feeling like it was stuck in my throat. Every time I swallow, I can feel it. Today, it moves lower down the throat. I think since it is so small and flat, it is just stuck in my throat. What should I do? Is it dangerous? I am very worried. Please help.
